🚪 /ork:auto Front-Door Reframe

PR playground — why a router with "don't use when you already know" recorded zero invocations ever, and what changed. Skill-activation audit, 2026-07-12.

📉 Measured baseline (before this PR)

0
/ork:auto model-initiated
invocations, ever 0.0%
nudge adoption
(3,705 shown) ~10
distinct skills fired by name
out of 112 published 24%
agent telemetry rows
attributed "unknown"

🔁 The self-defeating loop (interactive)

Old rule: route ONLY when the model does not believe it knows. New rule: route by default; unambiguous goals short-circuit (1-step, no overhead).

⛓️ Causal chain

SKILL.md description"Go direct when you already know the skill / the request maps unambiguously to one"
▼
Model reads description at decision timeskills surface via descriptions in the system prompt — no harness auto-routing
▼
"I already know what to do"a competent model believes this on essentially every request
▼
Instruction says: then DON'T routethe only state that permits routing never occurs
▼
0 invocations everthe front door re-creates the dead-skill problem its own "Why this exists" note describes

📝 Description: before → after

Use when you describe a goal not a method, when the right skill is
unclear, or when you want the agent to pick the approach.

| Use /ork:auto when…            | Go direct when…                    |
|--------------------------------|-----------------------------------|
| You describe a goal            | You already know the skill        |
| The right skill isn't obvious  | The request maps unambiguously to one |
The DEFAULT entry point for any goal-shaped request. A goal that maps
unambiguously to one skill short-circuits straight to it — routing is
never overhead, so use it even when you think you know the target.

| Use /ork:auto for…                          | Skip only when…              |
|---------------------------------------------|------------------------------|
| Any goal description                        | Already inside another skill |
| The right skill isn't obvious               | (no recursion)               |
| You think you know — auto confirms & routes |                              |

🧪 Companion fixes (same audit)

Repo / PRFix
platform #7411suggest-ork-skill v2: command-position matching (3,702-event ledger replay), model-visible hookSpecificOutput nudge, subagent suppression, session cooldown + scripts/skill-adoption-retro.py (the never-built adoption consumer)
hq-ext-plugin #649 (v1.31.0)/hq-ext:auto same reframe + practice-score tool_mastery formula fixed to the real ledger schema
orchestkit (this PR + sibling)this reframe; sibling PR restores skill-usage.jsonl writer + agent-type attribution at SubagentStop
